outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran ceasefire under strain as Israel strikes continue in Lebanon, oil surges past $98
outlets.summary: CNN covers ceasefire tensions as oil prices surge on Hormuz closure and Israeli Lebanon strikes. VP Vance heads to Islamabad for historic talks.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth's claims about Iran war contradict reality, officials say
outlets.summary: WaPo investigates disconnect between Hegseth's 'historic victory' claims and Joint Chiefs Chairman Caine's more cautious assessment.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth declares 'decisive military victory' in Iran after Trump accepts ceasefire deal
outlets.summary: Fox covers Hegseth's Pentagon press conference declaring Iran's military 'combat ineffective for years to come.' Trump described war as 'unqualified success.'

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump warns strikes will resume if Iran doesn't agree to his terms
outlets.summary: NPR covers Hegseth's victory declaration and Trump's warnings about ceasefire conditions.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Vance delegation arrives for Islamabad peace talks as ceasefire strains deepen
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera live coverage of Islamabad talks preparation. Kharazi death confirmed. Saudi-Iran FM call. Hormuz remains closed.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Strait of Hormuz shipping at standstill despite Iran ceasefire — zero oil tankers through
outlets.summary: Coverage of Hormuz closure persisting despite ceasefire. 800+ vessels trapped. Iran demands $2M transit fee. Oil surges past $98.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF Chief Zamir: Iran 'much weaker,' IDF achievements 'unprecedented'; Hezbollah fires 70+ rockets
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers IDF Chief's Lebanon visit, Hezbollah rocket barrages, and Netanyahu's authorization of direct Lebanon negotiations.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF 98th Division captures nearly all of Bint Jbeil
outlets.summary: JPost reports on IDF ground operations in southern Lebanon.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Former FM Kharazi dies from US-Israeli strike wounds; Supreme Leader calls Iranians 'definitive victors'
outlets.summary: Iranian media mourns Kharazi death, highlights Mojtaba Khamenei's written statement calling Iranians 'definitive victors' and demanding compensation.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Former FM Kharazi dies from US-Israeli strike wounds; Supreme Leader calls Iranians 'definitive victors'
outlets.summary: Iranian media mourns Kharazi death, highlights Mojtaba Khamenei's written statement calling Iranians 'definitive victors' and demanding compensation.
